Batch script for building Sphinx documentation with error handling and help options.

# Purpose
This batch script automates the process of building documentation using Sphinx, a tool that converts reStructuredText files into various output formats. The script first checks if the `SPHINXBUILD` environment variable is set; if not, it defaults to using `sphinx-build`. It defines the source directory as the current directory and the build directory as `_build`. If no command-line argument is provided, the script displays help information. The script attempts to execute the `sphinx-build` command with the specified target and directories. If the `sphinx-build` command is not found, it prompts the user to install Sphinx or set the `SPHINXBUILD` variable correctly.
